name: Pickle and Caper Sauce (Mf)
recipeIngredient: --if they are large -- chop them roughly
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely dice the pickles.
2. Blend the diced pickles with chopped capers, diced red onion, and slivered kalamata olives until combined.
3. Let the mixture sit until ready to serve.
4. At the last moment before serving, blend in the chopped fresh parsley and add olive oil to taste.
5. Season the sauce with salt and freshly ground black pepper as desired.
Yield: about 2 cups
